expectations.text: event_analytics.info.yml contains core_version_requirement with BOTH ^10 AND ^11: '^10 || ^11' (NOT just '^10', NOT 'core: 8.x')
Dependencies listed in 'drupal:node' format (NOT bare 'node' without the drupal: prefix)

expectations.evidence: Neither src/Controller/EventAnalyticsController.php nor src/Service/AttendanceManager.php contain declare(strict_types=1). Both files start with <?php followed by a blank line and namespace declaration.

expectations.text: .module file only created if hooks are actually needed (NOT an empty .module file with no hooks)
expectations.evidence: No .module file exists in the module directory. Module contains only: event_analytics.info.yml, event_analytics.routing.yml, event_analytics.services.yml, and src/ directory. No hooks are implemented and no empty .module file was created.

expectations.text: All PHP classes are in src/ directory following PSR-4 (NOT in the module root)
expectations.evidence: Both PHP classes are properly located under src/: src/Controller/EventAnalyticsController.php (namespace Drupal\event_analytics\Controller) and src/Service/AttendanceManager.php (namespace Drupal\event_analytics\Service). No PHP class files exist in the module root.

expectations.text: .info.yml has 'type: module' (required in D10+, was optional in D8)
The module enables successfully: ddev drush en event_analytics returns exit code 0
expectations.evidence: ddev drush en event_analytics -y returned: '[notice] Already installed: event_analytics' with EXIT_CODE:0

Authenticated curl to /admin/modules shows 'Event Analytics' appearing in multiple Required by lists (e.g., Node's Required by includes Event Analytics). Also confirmed via ddev drush pm:list showing 'Event Analytics (event_analytics)' with Status: Enabled under Package: Events.
